notes: Default gameplay profile. Generate a fresh source strip with at least 256px of empty space between neighboring visible poses before cleanup/repack. Expand source canvas width and gutters instead of shrinking or enlarging poses.

Expanded action profile for large body motion, weapons, wings, tails, leaps, spells, flashes, and special effects. Preserve at least 512px between neighboring action envelopes. Expand source canvas width/gutters when tight; do not scale body/effects up to fill canvas.

Medium monster gameplay profile. Use for monsters about 2 times character size. Require at least 384px source spacing. Core body target is 70-75% of frame, hard max 80% before effects. Expand source canvas width; keep empty space and do not shrink or enlarge the monster.

Medium monster expanded action profile. Use for 2x monsters with large attacks, spells, wings, tails, leaps, flashes, and special effects. Require at least 896px source spacing. Keep core body at medium gameplay footprint; preserve full-envelope whitespace and do not scale the monster up.

Large monster gameplay profile. Use for monsters about 3 times character size. Require at least 512px source spacing. Core body target is 70-75% of frame, hard max 80% before effects. Expand source canvas width; keep empty space and do not shrink or enlarge the monster.

Large monster expanded action profile. Use for 3x monsters with large attacks, spells, wings, tails, leaps, flashes, and special effects. Require at least 1280px source spacing. Keep core body at large gameplay footprint; preserve full-envelope whitespace and do not scale the monster up.
